records.question: Which products have a standard cost of 9.3463, a safety stock level of 500, no days to manufacture, and a document modified on 2013-12-29 13:51:58?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT product.productid FROM product
JOIN productdocument ON product.productid = productdocument.productid
WHERE product.standardcost = 9.3463 AND product.safetystocklevel = 500 AND product.daystomanufacture = 0 AND productdocument.modifieddate = '2013-12-29 13:51:58.0'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.ProductID FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductDocument AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.StandardCost = 9.3463 AND T1.SafetyStockLevel = 500 AND T1.DaysToManufacture = 0 AND T2.ModifiedDate = '2013-12-29 13:51:58'

records.question: Which products have a safety stock level of at least 500, belong to productline R, have a makeflag of exactly 0, and have a related document modified on 2013-12-29 13:51:58?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT product.productid FROM product
JOIN productcosthistory ON product.productid = productcosthistory.productid
JOIN productdocument ON product.productid = productdocument.productid
WHERE product.safetystocklevel >= 500 AND product.productline = 'R' AND product.makeflag = 0 AND productdocument.modifieddate = '2013-12-29 13:51:58.0'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.ProductID FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductDocument AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.SafetyStockLevel >= 500 AND T1.ProductLine = 'R' AND T1.MakeFlag = 0 AND T2.ModifiedDate = '2013-12-29 13:51:58'

records.question: Which products have a finished goods flag of at most 0 and an inventory quantity exactly equal to 641?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT product.productid FROM product
JOIN productinventory ON product.productid = productinventory.productid
WHERE product.finishedgoodsflag <= 0 AND productinventory.quantity = 641
records.pred_sql: SELECT Product.ProductID FROM Product WHERE Product.FinishedGoodsFlag <= 0 AND Product.SafetyStockLevel = 641

records.question: Which products have the product number HT-8019 and a finished goods flag of at most 0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT product.productid FROM product
WHERE product.productnumber = 'HT-8019' AND product.finishedgoodsflag <= 0
records.pred_sql: SELECT ProductID FROM Product WHERE ProductNumber = 'HT-8019' AND FinishedGoodsFlag <= 0

records.question: Which products in productline M have a standard cost and cost history exactly 19.7758, a list price exactly 44.54, makeflag exactly 1, safety stock level exactly 500, and inventory quantity at most 316?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT product.productid FROM product
JOIN productcosthistory ON product.productid = productcosthistory.productid
JOIN productinventory ON product.productid = productinventory.productid
WHERE product.productline = 'M' AND productinventory.quantity <= 316 AND product.standardcost = 19.7758 AND productcosthistory.standardcost = 19.7758 AND product.makeflag = 1 AND product.listprice = 44.54 AND product.safetystocklevel = 500
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.ProductID
FROM Product AS T1
INNER JOIN ProductInventory AS T2
  ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID
WHERE
  T1.ProductLine = 'M' AND T1.StandardCost = 19.7758 AND T1.ListPrice = 44.54 AND T1.MakeFlag = 1 AND T1.SafetyStockLevel = 500 AND T2.Quantity <= 316

records.question: Which products have a product number exactly LI-8000, a standard cost of 0.0, a safety stock level of at least 1000, a finished goods flag of at least 0, and a reorder point of at most 750?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT product.productid FROM product
WHERE product.standardcost = 0.0 AND product.safetystocklevel >= 1000 AND product.productnumber = 'LI-8000' AND product.finishedgoodsflag >= 0 AND product.reorderpoint <= 750
records.pred_sql: SELECT Product.ProductID FROM Product WHERE Product.ProductNumber = 'LI-8000' AND Product.StandardCost = 0.0 AND Product.SafetyStockLevel >= 1000 AND Product.FinishedGoodsFlag >= 0 AND Product.ReorderPoint <= 750

records.question: Which products are linked to documents with a status of at most 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT product.productid FROM product
JOIN productdocument ON product.productid = productdocument.productid
JOIN document ON productdocument.documentnode = document.documentnode
WHERE document.status <= 1
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.ProductID FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductDocument AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T2.Status <= 1

records.question: What products have a product number of FR-M94B-42, weigh exactly 2.72, have a safety stock level of 500, a make flag of 1, a standard cost of 739.041, size unit measure code CM, and a product subcategory ID at most 12?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT product.productid FROM product
WHERE product.safetystocklevel = 500 AND product.productsubcategoryid <= 12.0 AND product.weight = 2.72 AND product.makeflag = 1 AND product.productnumber = 'FR-M94B-42' AND product.standardcost = 739.041 AND product.sizeunitmeasurecode = 'CM'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.ProductID FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN UnitMeasure AS T2 ON T1.SizeUnitMeasureCode = T2.UnitMeasureCode WHERE T1.ProductNumber = 'FR-M94B-42' AND T1.Weight = 2.72 AND T1.SafetyStockLevel = 500 AND T1.MakeFlag = 1 AND T1.StandardCost = 739.041 AND T1.SizeUnitMeasureCode = 'CM' AND T1.ProductSubcategoryID <= 12

records.question: Which products have a list price exactly 1079.99 and also have related records in productcosthistory and productinventory?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT product.productid FROM product
JOIN productcosthistory ON product.productid = productcosthistory.productid
JOIN productinventory ON product.productid = productinventory.productid
WHERE product.listprice = 1079.99
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.ProductID
FROM Product AS T1
INNER JOIN ProductCostHistory AS T2
  ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID
INNER JOIN ProductInventory AS T3
  ON T1.ProductID = T3.ProductID
WHERE
  T1.ListPrice = 1079.99

records.question: Which HL Mountain Pedal products with rowguid A05464E8-6B4D-42B3-A4D6-8683136F4B66 have a Silver/Black color, productsubcategoryid at most 13, makeflag at least 0, and product reviews rated at most 4?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT product.productid FROM product
JOIN productreview ON product.productid = productreview.productid
WHERE product.color = 'Silver/Black' AND productreview.rating <= 4 AND product.rowguid = 'A05464E8-6B4D-42B3-A4D6-8683136F4B66' AND product.name = 'HL Mountain Pedal' AND product.productsubcategoryid <= 13.0 AND product.makeflag >= 0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.ProductID
FROM Product AS T1
INNER JOIN ProductReview AS T2
  ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID
WHERE
  T1.Name LIKE '%HL Mountain Pedal%' AND T1.rowguid = 'A05464E8-6B4D-42B3-A4D6-8683136F4B66' AND T1.Color = 'Silver/Black' AND T1.ProductSubcategoryID <= 13 AND T1.MakeFlag >= 0 AND T2.Rating <= 4
